title: "Cognitive Surrender" — Friction in Human Labor and Education
snippet: "Cognitive surrender" Now let's use our human brains and hearts to determine when friction is useful, and when it is useless. I don't miss wrestling with a map, long division, or a pen and yellow pad. Don't take away my GPS, calculator, or keyboard. Eliminating nasty parts of human labor advanced society... Universities have a key role to play in defining the future of work, learning, and communit
match_reason: social (social_post) — Post is authored directly by Ann Kirschner from her known LinkedIn profile (linkedin.com/in/annkirschner), adding original commentary on AI and cognitive surrender in education.

title: Boo It And Use It: What Gen Z Gets Right About AI
snippet: I have been thinking about those boos at graduation. And the paradox: no demographic uses AI more than Gen Z. It's their productivity tool, their brainstorming partner, their 2 a.m. confessor. The booers and the power users are the same people. Meanwhile, higher education is busy updating the honor code... our whole notion of assessment needs reconsideration and innovation.
match_reason: social (social_post) — Post is authored directly by Ann Kirschner from her known LinkedIn profile, sharing and discussing her own Forbes article on Gen Z and AI.

title: Singularly useful — Using Claude AI for personal productivity prompts
snippet: Singularly useful, thanks Ruben Hassid! See? Claude liked the "about me" md prompt (see below) too: "What a delightful assignment — you're hiring me to interview you... Though just a tad scary too, to think about what Claude already knows about me....."

title: Redesigning Education for Critical Thinking and Communication (AI and institutional redesign)
snippet: This is a seriously important and provocative post by Sandra Loughlin, PhD. After decades of trumpeting the essential skills (critical thinking, communication, etc.)... Along comes AI, which reveals the need for a fundamental redesign of institutions and systems. #FutureofEducation #FutureofWork
